summary: M325 — Cloud-synced per-run statistics (run_stats Supabase table; account-only; client-side trim 100 rows per user via after-insert trigger). FTL-style map grid layout (M324) snaps every Act 1-6 zone's nodes onto a 12-col x 12-row grid (6 logical rows x 2 alternating sublanes) preserving graph topology. Clockwork Turret + Tinker sprites regenerated via SpriteCook (12 poses total: 5 turret, 7 tinker; reference-asset chained for character consistency). Checkbox checkmark glyph reworked: now an inline-SVG background-image at 70% size on the box itself, scales perfectly with whatever dimensions the checkbox has.
